scripts.wp:cli: cd backend && wp-env run cli wp
scripts.wp:plugin:install: cd backend && WP_CLI="npx wp-env run cli wp" ./install_plugins.sh
scripts.wp:set-admin-password: cd backend && WP_CLI="npx wp-env run cli wp" ./set-admin-password.sh
scripts.wp:plugin:list: cd backend && wp-env run cli wp plugin list
scripts.wp:db:reset: cd backend && wp-env run cli wp db reset --yes
scripts.wp:page:create: cd backend && wp-env run cli wp post create --post_type=page --post_title='Home' --post_status=publish
scripts.wp:migrate: cd backend && wp-env run cli wp site migrate
scripts.setup: npm run wp:start && npm run wp:plugin:install && npm run wp:set-admin-password
